## Section

Which methodology section does this issue concern?

- Page or paragraph reference (if relevant):

## Issue

Describe the ambiguity, error, or clarification request.

## Proposed resolution

If you have a specific text suggestion, include it here. If you are flagging an issue without a proposed resolution, that is fine; describe the question.

## Brand-voice note (for maintainer use)

The methodology document follows `voice-guide-v1.3.docx` Section B.1.2: full technical register, APA 7 in-text citations, institutional voice, no first person, active voice, no contractions, no banned words, no mid-sentence em dashes. Proposed amendments will be reviewed for compliance before merge.
